title: hieracium subramosum subsp. pseudorarium
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. pseudorarium, a lesser-known species within the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant commonly known as hawkweed or false hawkweed. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to leverage its health benefits and support overall well-being.
